meaning: 索契[苏联高加索中西部黑海东岸港市](著名疗养地)
examples: He won second place in the same competition four years ago in Sochi.
Halsted aims to compete at the 2014 Paralympic Winter Games in Sochi, Russia.
Russia, the host nation for next Winter Games in Sochi in 2014, won 15 MEDALS, three of them gold.
On a recent day, cranes, dump trucks and earth-moving vehicles were busy carrying out Sochi's facelift.
Bush is due to meet Putin on Sunday in the Russian Black Sea resort of Sochi.
